main.description: A topic (thread) within a forum board. Points back to its board via a strongRef so Constellation backlinks can list every topic in a board.

board.description: The board record this topic lives in. Discovery path: '.board.uri'.

body.description: Opening post body in Creaton forum markdown.

protectedBody.description: Encrypted opening body for a protected board. Must not be combined with body.

protectedAttachments.description: Logos-hosted encrypted attachments for a protected topic.

pinned.description: Whether the topic is stickied to the top of its board.

movedTo.description: If moved, the new topic record this one was moved to.

linkUrl.description: Optional external link associated with the topic.

productionStage.description: Optional Creaton studio production stage tag.

artifactUri.description: Optional reference to a studio artifact this topic discusses.
